message:
feat(query): add LogicTable protocol for @logic_table runtime support

Implement the lanceql side of the @logic_table protocol:
- LogicTableContext: stores pre-loaded column data for batch operations
- batchCosineSimilarity: GPU/SIMD accelerated cosine similarity
- batchL2Distance: L2 (Euclidean) distance computation
- batchDotProduct: GPU/SIMD accelerated dot product

The LogicTable protocol bridges metal0 compiled code with lanceql execution:
- metal0 compiles @logic_table classes to batch functions with dependencies
- lanceql loads column data and executes the compiled functions

Build changes:
- Move metal_mod definition earlier (needed by query module)
- Add Metal/Accelerate linking to query module tests
